title: Canada
sacredPoliticalOrderDefinition: Draft operational shorthand for the durable shared meanings, legitimacy claims, memory, obligation, and sacrifice logic associated with Canada.
sacredPoliticalOrderStrengthRationale: Provisional scaffold score based on the case outcome category; requires evidence-chain review before scholarly use.
selectionRationale: Included to test whether sacred political order and institutional embodiment can be restrained by corrigibility, pluralism, and bounded sacrifice.
theoryTest: Tests whether correction capacity can restrain sacralization and sacrificial escalation.
